name: Hana Koa Brewing Co.
tagline: Oahu's best brewery in a converted Coca-Cola factory — tropical IPAs, spacious beer garden, and rotating food pop-ups.
parking: Street parking in Kakaako; some lot spaces
talkStory: Founded in 2019 by Dave Campbell and Chuck Kaaiai, 'Hana Koa' means 'work of a warrior' in Hawaiian -- fitting for a brewery that converted a 1940s Coca-Cola syrup warehouse into Oahu's best taproom. Head brewer Inu studied in Germany and his Kolsch reflects that training. The spacious beer garden hosts local families, and rotating food pop-ups feature top Honolulu chefs testing new concepts.
